title: RAN interference troubleshooting
steps: Compare SINR, PRB utilization, and handover KPIs for affected and neighbor cells
Verify external interference source with spectrum or field measurement
Review recent radio parameter changes for PCI, tilt, and power
Adjust PCI, antenna tilt, or transmit power only after approval
Monitor SINR, PRB utilization, and handover success after action

title: RAN backhaul outage troubleshooting
steps: Confirm cell unavailability and N2 association state
Check backhaul reachability, packet loss, and interface state
Escalate confirmed physical or transport failure to transport team
Restore backhaul path or fail over to protected path
Validate N2 setup success, packet loss, and cell availability

title: PCI conflict and mobility troubleshooting
steps: Audit PCI assignment and neighbor relation changes
Identify duplicate or ambiguous PCI on adjacent cells
Assign non-conflicting PCI to one affected cell after approval
Refresh neighbor relation data
Validate handover success and radio link failure KPIs
validation_rules: No duplicate PCI on adjacent cells

title: RRU power failure troubleshooting
steps: Confirm cell unavailable alarm and radio unit reachability
Check RRU power module voltage and related VSWR alarms
Dispatch field team to inspect and restore or replace power module
Bring cell back into service after hardware recovery
Validate RRU reachability, cell availability, and cleared alarms

title: SMF policy database timeout troubleshooting
steps: Check PDU session success rate and SMF reject reason
Measure SMF to policy database latency and timeout rate
Fail over policy database endpoint if latency remains abnormal
Retry representative PDU session establishment
Validate session success rate and policy latency

title: AMF overload troubleshooting
steps: Confirm registration reject rate and AMF overload state
Identify signaling source and abnormal attach volume
Scale AMF capacity or shift traffic to healthy AMF instances
Disable overload control only after load has normalized
Validate registration success rate and AMF CPU

title: UPF CPU saturation troubleshooting
steps: Confirm UPF worker CPU, throughput, and queue drop metrics
Verify SMF control plane and external data network status
Shift traffic or scale UPF capacity after approval
Monitor packet workers during traffic relief
Validate throughput recovery and queue drop normalization

title: Core DNS resolver troubleshooting
steps: Verify DNS query failure rate and SERVFAIL responses
Confirm NRF and peer network functions are otherwise healthy
Fail over affected network functions to standby resolver
Clear resolver cache only if stale records are confirmed
Validate DNS success rate and NRF discovery latency

title: Optical attenuation troubleshooting
steps: Check optical RX power, CRC errors, and packet loss trend
Inspect connector, patch cord, and fiber span for attenuation
Clean connector or dispatch fiber repair team
Restore protected path if available while physical repair proceeds
Validate optical power, CRC errors, and packet loss
validation_rules: RX optical power in normal range

title: Interface down after change troubleshooting
likely_causes: Router interface admin down after change
steps: Review latest router commit and maintenance window notes
Confirm interface admin and operational state
Restore interface admin state or roll back unintended change
Verify routing and traffic forwarding after rollback
Validate link state, traffic volume, and cleared alarms

title: BGP flap caused by MTU mismatch
likely_causes: BGP neighbor instability due to MTU mismatch
steps: Check BGP neighbor reset reason and route withdrawal count
Compare MTU on both sides of the peering interface
Align MTU configuration or adjust path MTU consistently
Clear BGP session during approved window if needed
Validate BGP stability and route withdrawal rate

title: Transport link congestion troubleshooting
steps: Confirm link utilization, queue drops, and latency trend
Identify traffic class causing congestion
Shift traffic or apply temporary QoS relief after approval
Plan capacity expansion if congestion is recurrent
Validate utilization, drop rate, and latency after relief
